name: goldilocks-app
description: React web app with embedded pi agent for DFT input file generation

scripts.dev:setup: kind get clusters | grep -q goldilocks || kind create cluster --name goldilocks --config deploy/kind-config.yaml
scripts.dev:web: concurrently "PORT=3000 npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.dev:both: concurrently "PORT=3000 npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w agent-service" "npm run dev -w frontend -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w agent-service && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w agent-service && npm run lint -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w server && npm run typecheck -w agent-service && npm run typecheck -w frontend
